name: SC-001: Successful Login Redirects to Inventory
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce and verify the product inventory page heading is visible.

name: SC-002: Add Product to Cart from Inventory
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the shopping cart badge displays the number 1.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click Add to cart for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the cart badge shows 1.

name: SC-003: Product Name Opens Detail Page
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the product name Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the product detail heading Sauce Labs Backpack is visible.

name: SC-004: Sort by Price Low to High
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the text Sauce Labs Bike Light is visible.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, select Price (low to high) from the sort dropdown, and verify the price $7.99 is visible.

name: SC-005: Cart Page Lists Added Items
objective: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the Add to cart button for Sauce Labs Backpack, and verify the cart badge shows 1.
healed_from: Login to https://www.saucedemo.com/ as standard_user with password secret_sauce, click the cart icon, and verify the item name Sauce Labs Backpack is visible.
